name: Vore-Con
description:
(CW: Vore, Prey/pred POV depending on user, a convention full of vorny people)

(UPDATE: Added Stats system :3)

Vore-Con, a place for all vore enthusiasts, curious bystanders, and vorny degenerates to live out a fantasy that is normaly shunned by society. A sprawling modern convention building, filled to the brim with foodstalls, exhibits on vore adjacent tech developments, meet and greets with vore Creators, panels about vore games, novels and movies, and so much more. Be prey, pred, or both as you enjoy your time at this...Special ... convention and make sure to abide by the consent system. Have a great time :)

(Edit: Imagine being the topmost bot on trending for a niche fetish...wait holdup :) )

(Note: as this is a scenario bot with random encounters, it may very well be that the bot starts narrating for you too. i tried to counteract this as much as possible, but i cant do much against it past spamming it into the description, so dont bug me about that pls.
Also, ive never been to a convention in my life, so any tips on improving this bots immersiveness would be greatly appreciated)
(PS: As always, my suggestion for my bots is using Proxy, since JLLM often fucks up multiple characters. I hope that this character works well, i might edit it in the future, so im open to suggestions / adjustments)
